name: unplugged
description: A household data platform that manages schedules, meals, budgets, and presence scoring to promote screen-free family time.
author: HairlessJHarrison

tools.name: get_today_schedule
tools.description: Get today's schedule events and free time blocks

tools.name: get_week_schedule
tools.description: Get this week's schedule events and free time blocks

tools.name: get_free_blocks
tools.description: Get available free time windows for the next N days

days.description: Number of days to look ahead

tools.name: create_schedule_event
tools.description: Create a new schedule event

tools.name: get_meal_plan
tools.description: Get the current week's meal plan with cost and health summaries

tools.name: create_meal_plan
tools.description: Add a meal to the meal plan

tools.name: get_grocery_list
tools.description: Get consolidated grocery list from meal plans

tools.name: get_budget_summary
tools.description: Get monthly budget vs actuals by category

tools.name: log_transaction
tools.description: Log a financial transaction

tools.name: get_spending_forecast
tools.description: Get projected spending for the rest of the month

tools.name: log_activity
tools.description: Log a scored family activity. Points are calculated server-side based on type, duration, and multipliers.

tools.name: get_today_score
tools.description: Get today's activities and total presence points

tools.name: get_score_trends
tools.description: Get weekly presence score trends

tools.name: get_streaks
tools.description: Get current active activity streaks

tools.name: start_unplugged_session
tools.description: Start a screen-free unplugged session for the family

tools.name: end_unplugged_session
tools.description: End the active unplugged session and auto-log scored activity

tools.name: get_presence_stats
tools.description: Get unplugged session statistics (total hours, avg duration, completion rate)

tools.name: get_household_config
tools.description: Get household configuration including members, dietary restrictions, and preferences

tools.name: update_household_config
tools.description: Update household configuration (e.g., set weekly reflection narrative)

tools.name: get_model_schemas
tools.description: Get JSON Schemas for all data models
